from notebookutils import mssparkutils

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

mpesc_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"
FULL_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-SPREADSHEET/EXTRACT/LinkedCase.csv"

print("Using:", mpesc_base_path)
print("Full path:", FULL_PATH)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import BooleanType

df_raw = (
    spark.read
         .option("header", "true")
         .option("inferSchema", "true")
         .csv(FULL_PATH)
)

print(f"Rows loaded : {df_raw.count()}")
df_raw.printSchema()
df_raw.show(5, truncate=False)

unexpected = df_raw.filter(~F.col("isLead").isin(0, 1))
unexpected_count = unexpected.count()

if unexpected_count > 0:
    print(f"WARNING: {unexpected_count} rows have unexpected isLead values:")
    unexpected.select("id", "isLead").show(20, truncate=False)
else:
    print("Validation passed – isLead contains only 0 and 1.")

df_transformed = df_raw.withColumn(
    "isLead",
    F.col("isLead").cast(BooleanType())
)

df_transformed.printSchema()
df_transformed.show(5, truncate=False)

null_count = df_transformed.filter(F.col("isLead").isNull()).count()
assert null_count == 0, f"Transform introduced {null_count} null values in isLead!"

true_count  = df_transformed.filter(F.col("isLead") == True).count()
false_count = df_transformed.filter(F.col("isLead") == False).count()
print(f"isLead = true  : {true_count} rows")
print(f"isLead = false : {false_count} rows")
print(f"Total          : {true_count + false_count} rows (no nulls)")

TEMP_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/LinkedCase/_linkedcase_temp"

(
    df_transformed
        .coalesce(1)
        .write
        .option("header", "true")
        .mode("overwrite")
        .csv(TEMP_PATH)
)

print(f"Written to temp path: {TEMP_PATH}")

files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(TEMP_PATH)
part_file = next(f.path for f in files if f.name.startswith("part-") and f.name.endswith(".csv"))

mssparkutils.fs.mv(part_file, FULL_PATH, overwrite=True)
mssparkutils.fs.rm(TEMP_PATH, recurse=True)

print(f"Successfully replaced: {FULL_PATH}")

df_verify = (
    spark.read
         .option("header", "true")
         .option("inferSchema", "true")
         .csv(FULL_PATH)
)

df_verify.printSchema()
df_verify.show(5, truncate=False)
print(f"Row count: {df_verify.count()}")
